name: Steamodded (SMODS)
description: Balatro modding framework for custom jokers, decks, editions, and game objects. Lua-based with hot-reload support.

name: Lovely Injector
description: Runtime Lua injector for LOVE2D games. Used as the injection layer for Steamodded and other Balatro mods.

name: Minecraft Forge
description: The original modding API for Minecraft: Java Edition. Powers thousands of mods with event-based hooks and registry system.

name: NeoForge
description: Community-driven Minecraft modding API forked from Minecraft Forge. Modernized codebase with improved contributor governance.

name: Fabric API
description: Lightweight Minecraft modding toolchain with fast version updates. Minimal abstraction layer favored for performance-focused mods.

name: Quilt Loader
description: Fabric-compatible Minecraft mod loader with improved governance model and enhanced API features.

name: Paper
description: High-performance Minecraft server with extended plugin API. Optimized fork of Spigot used by most large servers.

name: SKSE (Skyrim Script Extender)
description: Extends Skyrim's Papyrus scripting capabilities. Required by hundreds of mods for features beyond the base scripting engine.

name: Mod Organizer 2
description: Mod manager using virtual filesystem to keep game installs clean. Supports Bethesda games and others via plugins.

name: LOOT
description: Automatic mod load order optimizer and conflict detector for Bethesda games. Prevents crashes from incorrect plugin ordering.

name: xEdit
description: Module viewer, editor, and conflict detector for Bethesda game plugins. Essential for mod authors and advanced load order debugging.

name: Creation Kit
description: Bethesda's official modding editor for Skyrim, Fallout, and Starfield. Full world and quest editing capabilities.

name: SMAPI
description: The modding API for Stardew Valley. Provides event system, content pipeline, and cross-platform mod compatibility.

name: Harmony
description: .NET runtime method patching library. Used across RimWorld, Stardew Valley, Cities: Skylines, and many other modded games.

name: tModLoader
description: Mod loader and framework for creating and playing Terraria mods. Integrated into Terraria as free DLC on Steam.

name: BepInEx
description: Plugin and modding framework for Unity, IL2CPP, and MonoGame titles. Supports patching, configuration, and logging out of the box.

name: MelonLoader
description: Universal mod loader for Unity games supporting both IL2CPP and Mono backends. Auto-generates proxy assemblies for modding.

name: Thunderstore
description: Mod hosting platform and API for discovering and distributing mods across 150+ games. Community-driven with CLI tooling.

name: UE4SS
description: Lua scripting system, SDK generator, and live editor for Unreal Engine 4/5 games. Enables modding without engine source access.

name: Godot Mod Loader
description: General-purpose mod loader for Godot 3.x and 4.x games. Provides mod loading, configuration, and dependency management.

name: OpenMW
description: Open-source reimplementation of the Morrowind engine with built-in editor. Adds mod-friendly features beyond the original engine.

name: r2modman
description: Mod manager for games using Thunderstore as backend. Profile-based mod management with automatic dependency resolution.

name: Wiremod
description: Garry's Mod add-on for wiring components into automatic contraptions. Visual logic system for in-game automation.
